description.short: Nathan Ellis, your ParlayVU agent orchestrator.
description.full: Nathan Ellis is ParlayVU's lead orchestrator. Mention @ParlayVU in any bound client channel to ask Nathan questions, pull project context, search the web, summarize documents the team has filed, and file meeting notes.

commands.title: status
commands.description: Summarize the bound client's current project status.

commands.title: what does the [report name] say
commands.description: Pull a previously ingested report from project context and summarize.

commands.title: search [topic]
commands.description: Web search via Tavily and return a synthesized answer.

commands.title: file notes
commands.description: File a meeting summary to this channel as Word + Markdown.

commands.title: bind this channel to [client]
commands.description: One-time setup: bind this Teams channel to a ParlayVU client so Nathan knows which client's context to load.

commands.title: status
commands.description: Summarize the bound client's current project status.

commands.title: what does the [report name] say
commands.description: Pull a previously ingested report from project context and summarize.
